Hickam_Orientation: The integration of KIRA-7 Feishu Agentic Inversion bridges complex human intent with deterministic API execution. By enforcing Webhook Sovereignty and deploying Feishu Interactive Cards as Epistemic Escrows, the system demands clarification rather than silently failing.
Contrastive_Delta: PolySymbol Pro evolved from a passive utility to an active constraint engine. We introduced `feishu_symbiosis_inversion/` containing the core thesis and implementation checklist for Feishu Webhooks, updated the project documentation, and integrated the KIRA-7 protocols (DCCDSchemaGuard, SagaRecovery) into the operational theater.
